string.name: message
string.value: Utopia Deli serves Monday–Saturday, 12:30 PM–7:30 PM (CT). Please come back during open hours.

parameters.functionCode: return [{ json: { data: [ ['SKU_COWBOY', "Cowboy Chik'n Sandwich", 1295, 'SQ_COWBOY', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_CLUB', "Chik'n Club Sub", 1195, 'SQ_CLUB', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_FRIED', "Chik'n Fried Chik'n Sub", 1095, 'SQ_FRIED', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_POPPERS', "Chik'n Poppers", 895, 'SQ_POPPERS', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_KOREAN', 'Korean Pork Dumpling Tacos', 1395, 'SQ_KOREAN', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_PHILLY', 'Philly Sub', 1250, 'SQ_PHILLY', 'TRUE'], ['SKU_SLIDERS', "Rocktown Bourbon Chik'n Sliders", 1350, 'SQ_SLIDERS', 'TRUE'] ] } }];

const row = [
  new Date().toISOString(),
  $item(0).$node['Set — Normalize'].json['customer.name'],
  $item(0).$node['Set — Normalize'].json['customer.email'],
  $item(0).$node['Set — Normalize'].json['customer.phone'],
  $item(0).$node['Set — Normalize'].json['geo.city'],
  $item(0).$node['Set — Normalize'].json['geo.county'],
  $item(0).$node['Function — Build Price'].json.entree.sku,
  JSON.stringify($item(0).$node['Function — Collect Modifiers'].json.modifiers||[]),
  $item(0).$node['Function — Compute Tax & Totals'].json.pricing.subtotal_cents,
  $item(0).$node['Function — Compute Tax & Totals'].json.pricing.tax_cents,
  $item(0).$node['Function — Compute Tax & Totals'].json.pricing.total_cents,
  $item(0).$node['Set — Confirmation'].json.square_link,
  'pending_payment'
];
return [{ json: { gs_append: [row] } }];

string.name: message
string.value: We sent your payment link. Check your email (SMS if needed).
